description: Join the Jitsi Meet session 'TrainingSession' as 'Training Lead'. Document the keyboard shortcuts by saving a screenshot of the shortcuts overlay to /home/ga/shortcuts_evidence.png. Create a text file at /home/ga/shortcuts_reference.txt listing the keys and descriptions for Mute/Unmute Microphone, Start/Stop Camera, and Show/Hide Filmstrip using the format '[Key] - [Description]'.
